allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix cross-device authentication and farmer crop loading

Critical Fixes:
- auth.js: Fixed req.user.userId undefined bug - now correctly uses _id.toString() from MongoDB
- crops.js: Fixed farmer crop loading to support ObjectId and phone number queries
- Added flexible farmerId query with $or conditions for farmerAssociation lookup
- Fixed CastError when querying crops by phone number

cartService.ts: Reverted URLs to production Render backend (https://acchadam1-backend.onrender.com)

These fixes resolve:
1. Mobile login network error (403 access denied)
2. Farmer crops not loading after re-login
3. Cross-device data synchronization issues

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
